tags.name: monograph
tags.description: Monograph publication and related identifier management

post.description: Creates a new ISBN range. Note new range is not allowed to overlap any existing ranges.

post.summary: Create a new ISBN publisher range
post.description: Creates a new ISBN publisher range with associations to ISBN range and monograph publisher.

get.summary: Read monograph publisher information. Returned information depends on user application role.

post.summary: Endpoint for lightweight search that may be used in autocomplete
Merge monograph two monograph publications into one.
Add new expression to an existing publication
post.description: Adds a new expression to an existing expression

post.summary: Add new manifestation to an existing expression
post.description: Adds a new manifestation to an existing expression

post.summary: Assign an ISBN or ISMN identifier for manifestation. Requires the associated publication to have publisher assigned to it, publisher to have free identifiers appropriate for the expression type, and manifestation not being part of rejected publication request.
Deassign a manifestation identifier. Requires a set of preconditions to be met for the deassign process to complete without errors.
Create a new monograph publication request

patch.summary: Update Monograph publication request information. Note changing publisher or publication association cannot be done using this endpoint.

post.summary: Approve Monograph publication request. This considers assigning identifiers for all manifests from associated publisher's publisher ranges.
Transfer monograph publication request from completed state back into processing state. No alterations are made for associated entitites.

204.description: Transferring state to IN_PROCESS was successful

type.description: URI where user can read more about problem

detail.example: The requested operation is not permitted for unauthorized users.

monograph_publisher_id.description: Used for associating request and all its subentities with selected publisher registry publisher. Note that when defining this property, defining any other property is disallowed.

id.name: id
id.description: The id of the entity to retrieve or interact with
